segments.speaker: Administrator
segments.text: Hi there. What can I do for you?

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Hi, I'm Jongkuk, one of the new PhD students in architecture.

segments.speaker: Administrator
segments.text: Welcome. Have you met your advisor yet?

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Not yet. I have a meeting scheduled later this week, but I wanted to check in with the department first.

segments.speaker: Administrator
segments.text: Good. We can add you to the mailing list and confirm your studio assignment.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: That would be great. I don't want to miss any first-week announcements.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: It's still being activated. Can I give you my personal email for now and update it later?

segments.speaker: Administrator
segments.text: Sure. Just send us the university one when it's active.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Perfect. Also, is there a recommended process for course registration?

segments.speaker: Administrator
segments.text: Talk to your advisor first, then submit your selections online.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Got it. Thanks. I'm trying to start on the right foot.
